nasb.text: Baruch the son of Neriah did according to all that Jeremiah the prophet commanded him, reading from the book the words of the Lord in the Lord’s house.

esv.text: And Baruch the son of Neriah did all that Jeremiah the prophet ordered him about reading from the scroll the words of the Lord in the Lord’s house.

cnv.text: 尼利亞的兒子巴錄就照著耶利米先知吩咐的一切去行，在耶和華的殿裡宣讀書上耶和華的話。

ccb.text: 尼利亚的儿子巴录照耶利米先知的吩咐，在耶和华的殿中宣读卷轴上耶和华的话。
